identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

usage.headings: font-sans (Manrope) - Weights: 200 (Light) for elegance, 800 (ExtraBold) for impact

containers.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-4xl
containers.scanner: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-black

WaterRing.description: The core hero component. A circular progress ring showing the Water Quality Score (0-100).
WaterRing.style: SVG-based, animated stroke-dashoffset. Glowing drop-shadow. Centered number.
WaterRing.animation: Ease-out fill on load. Pulse effect on '100' score.

MetricCard.description: Glassmorphic cards for individual metrics (pH, Lead, Mercury).
MetricCard.style: Rounded-2xl, glass background, 1px subtle border. Icon top-left, Value center-large.

ScannerOverlay.style: Darkened corners (vignette). Central clear rounded-rect for barcode target. Animated scanning line (laser).

ReportTimeline.description: Vertical list of quality checks (EPA, EWG, Local).
ReportTimeline.style: Step-progress style. Connected vertical line. Icons for 'Pass/Fail'.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use deep solid colors + noise/grain texture.
DO NOT center everything. Use asymmetry in the dashboard grid.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings. Use 'Chivo Mono' for all numbers.
Ensure 3:1 contrast ratio for large text, 4.5:1 for small text.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to `public/index.html` head.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the 'Abyssal' color palette and font families.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Update `index.css` to set the dark background #020408 as default body bg.
4. SCAFFOLD: Create the `WaterRing` component first - it is the heart of the app.
5. MOCK DATA: Create a robust mock data file for water brands (Fiji, Evian, Dasani) with realistic chemical data.
6. SCANNER: Use `react-qr-barcode-scanner` or similar library. Mock the camera if environment doesn't support it, but build the UI.
7. REPORT: Build the 'CarFax' report page using the `ReportTimeline` component.
